available_ribbons.name: ASD Mission Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for participation in ASD-designated missions in support of House Wolf operations.

available_ribbons.name: House Wolf Contributor
available_ribbons.description: Awarded to members who actively contribute to the growth, development, or success of House Wolf.

available_ribbons.name: Discord Booster Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded to members who support the House Wolf community through Discord boosting.

available_ribbons.name: Minor Operation Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for participation in Mine or Die operational missions.

available_ribbons.name: Pack Tracker Beta Team
available_ribbons.description: Awarded to members who participated in testing and development of PackTracker systems.

available_ribbons.name: Pyro Service Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for service or operations conducted within the Pyro system.

available_ribbons.name: Quarantine Mission Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for participation in quarantine or containment-based missions.

available_ribbons.name: Rockbreaker Mission Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for participation in mining or resource extraction operations.

available_ribbons.name: Stormbreaker Mission Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for participation in high-intensity or large-scale operations.

available_ribbons.name: Tactical Strike Group Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for participation in coordinated tactical strike group missions.

available_ribbons.name: Wolf Dragoon Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded to members serving within or supporting Dragoon operations.

available_ribbons.name: Xeno Threat Mission Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for participation in XenoThreat or similar large-scale event operations.
